sentences.arabic: شَهِدَتْ وَسَائِلُ النَّقْلِ وَالْمَوَاصَلَاتِ طَفْرَةً كَيْمِيَائِيَّةً أَعَادَتْ هَيْكَلَةَ الْفَضَاءِ الْمَكَانِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sredstva transporta i komunikacije doživjela su hemijski skok koji je restrukturirao prostorni okvir.
sentences.translationEn: Means of transport and communication have undergone a chemical leap that restructured the spatial fabric.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ تَقَلَّصَتِ الْمَسَافَاتُ الشَّاسِعَةُ لِتُصْبِحَ مُجَرَّدَ هُوَيْنَةٍ زَمَنِيَّةٍ يَسِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ogromne udaljenosti su se smanjile i postale puki kratki vremenski intervali.
sentences.translationEn: Vast distances have shrunk to become mere short temporal intervals.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّسَارُعُ الْمَحْمُومُ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُجَرَّدَ تَقَدُّمٍ تِقْنِيٍّ بَحْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovo grozničavo ubrzanje nije bilo samo čisti tehnički napredak.
sentences.translationEn: This feverish acceleration was not just pure technical progress.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ أَدَّى إِلَى ظُهُورِ مَا يُسَمَّى "اللَّا-أَمَاكِنَ" فِي الْفَلَسَفَةِ الْمُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, dovelo je do pojave onoga što se u savremenoj filozofiji naziva 'nemjestima'.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it led to the emergence of what is called 'non-places' in contemporary philosophy.

sentences.arabic: تِلْكَ الْفَضَاءَاتُ الْبَيْنِيَّةُ كَالْمَطَارَاتِ تَتَّسِمُ بِالْحِيَادِ الْبَارِدِ وَتَجَرُّدِ الْهُوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ti međuprostori, poput aerodroma, odlikuju se hladnom neutralnošću i lišenošću identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: These intermediate spaces, such as airports, are characterized by cold neutrality and a lack of identity.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْمُسَافِرَ الْمُعَاصِرَ يَجِدُ نَفْسَهُ مَحْشُورًا فِي دَوَّامَةٍ مِنَ الْإِجْرَاءَاتِ الْبِيرُوقْرَاطِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Savremeni putnik se nalazi stiješnjen u vrtlogu birokratskih procedura.
sentences.translationEn: The modern traveler finds themselves squeezed into a vortex of bureaucratic procedures.

sentences.arabic: غَدَتْ عَمَلِيَّةُ التَّنَقُّلِ نَشَاطًا آلِيًّا يَفْتَقِرُ إِلَى الشَّاعِرِيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Proces kretanja postao je mehanička aktivnost kojoj nedostaje drevna poetičnost.
sentences.translationEn: The process of movement has become a mechanical activity lacking ancient poetics.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَى الرَّغْمِ مِنْ هَذِهِ النَّجَاعَةِ، فَإِنَّ التَّحَدِّيَاتِ الْبِيئِيَّةَ تُلْقِي بِظِلَالِهَا عَلَى الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos ovoj logističkoj efikasnosti, ekološki izazovi bacaju sjenu na budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: Despite this logistical efficiency, environmental challenges cast a shadow over the future.

sentences.arabic: أَدَّى ذَلِكَ إِلَى انْبِعَاثِ مَفْهُومِ "السَّفَرِ الْبَطِيءِ" كَتِرْيَاقٍ لِلتَّلَوُّثِ الْبَصَرِيِّ.
sentences.translation: To je dovelo do ponovnog rađanja koncepta 'sporog putovanja' kao protuotrova za vizuelno zagađenje.
sentences.translationEn: This has led to the rebirth of the concept of 'slow travel' as an antidote to visual pollution.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِفَاءَ بِالطَّرِيقِ بِمَا هُوَ مَقْصِدٌ فِي حَدِّ ذَاتِهِ يُعِيدُ لِلْمُدُنِ رَوْنَقَهَا.
sentences.translation: Slavljenje puta kao cilja samog po sebi vraća gradovima njihov sjaj.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrating the road as a destination in itself restores the luster of cities.

sentences.arabic: يَمْنَحُ هَذَا التَّوَجُّهُ لِلْمَعَالِمِ الْأَثَرِيَّةِ هَيْبَتَهَا الْمَسْلُوبَةَ مِنْ قِبَلِ الزِّحَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj pristup vraća arheološkim znamenitostima dostojanstvo koje im je oduzela gužva.
sentences.translationEn: This approach grants archaeological landmarks the majesty stripped from them by the crowds.

sentences.arabic: الْخَرِيطَةُ الْيَوْمَ لَمْ تَعُدْ وَرَقِيَّةً نَتَحَسَّسُ مَلَامِحَهَا بِأَصَابِعِنَا.
sentences.translation: Karta danas više nije papirna, da joj prstima opipavamo obrise.
sentences.translationEn: The map today is no longer paper for us to feel its features with our fingers.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ صَارَتْ خَوَارِزْمِيَّةً تُوجِّهُ خُطَانَا بِدِقَّةٍ صَارِمَةٍ وَآلِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Postala je algoritamska, usmjeravajući naše korake sa strogom i automatizovanom preciznošću.
sentences.translationEn: Instead, it has become algorithmic, directing our steps with strict and automated precision.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَوْجِبُ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِعَادَةَ حَقِّنَا فِي التِّيهِ الْجَمِيلِ وَالِانْفِتَاحِ عَلَى الْآخَرِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo povratiti svoje pravo na 'lijepo lutanje' i otvorenost prema drugome.
sentences.translationEn: We must reclaim our right to 'beautiful wandering' and openness to the other.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ أَدَبَ الرِّحْلَاتِ الْيَوْمَ يَقِفُ عِنْدَ مُفْتَرَقِ طُرُقٍ حَاسِمٍ.
sentences.translation: Putopisna književnost danas stoji na odlučujućoj raskrsnici.
sentences.translationEn: Travel literature today stands at a decisive crossroads.

sentences.arabic: إِمَّا الِانْصِيَاعُ لِسُلْطَةِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ أَوْ التَّحَرُّرُ نَحْوِ أُفُقٍ أَكْثَرَ إِنْسَانِيَّةً وَاسْتِدَامَةً.
sentences.translation: Ili pokoravanje moći aplikacija ili oslobađanje prema humanijem i održivijem horizontu.
sentences.translationEn: Either compliance with the authority of applications or liberation toward a more humane and sustainable horizon.
